messages.title: Server Configuration
messages.timePanelDesc:
Select a channel and configure the server time panel.

{warningEmoji} The selected channel should be empty and Tata must be able to view the channel and create webhooks.
messages.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.
messages.noChannelSelected: No channel selected. Please select a channel first.
messages.webhookPermissionError: I don't have permission to create webhook or view the channel.
messages.invalidWebhookUrl: Invalid webhook URL. Please re-select a channel.
messages.invalidHttpUrl: Please provide a valid http/https URL.
messages.customBannerCleared: Custom banner cleared. Default banner will be used.
